title: Title
text: Title Title displayed in the window title bar or browser tab when the application shell, form, or server page is run. If no title is specified, the object name is displayed. Expected Value: String of up to 32 characters. Supports Unicode. Default Value: None Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: For forms and application shells, applied only if the Caption property is True . Applies To Application Shell Dynamic Server Page Static Server Page Form Related Links Caption Window property that determines whether the form window has a title bar. Valid values: True (default) or False. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
